summary: Iteration 6 testing completed. All 9 features tested - 9 PASSED. Backend validation (email/mobile/employee_code uniqueness), task project filter (includes meeting-linked tasks), toggle switch for Group Sub-tasks, task count badge, and search with subtasks all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: User validation correctly returns 409 with specific messages for duplicate email/mobile/employee_code
Task API project filter correctly includes tasks from meetings linked to that project via subquery
Toggle switch implemented as custom CSS component with proper flex layout (single line)
Task count badge displays correctly next to page title with blue accent styling
buildDisplay() in task-list.component.ts correctly handles orphan subtasks in search results
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified. Data structure: Project 2 has Meeting 1 linked to it. Tasks 3 and 6 are meeting tasks (via meeting_id=1), Task 4 is direct project task (project_id=2). Subtask 7 'Update Sprint Board' has parent_task_id=1. Filter by project_id=2 returns 3 tasks correctly. Search works with both Group Sub-tasks ON and OFF.

verified_features.mobile_duplicate_409: PASS - POST /api/admin/users returns 409 'Mobile number already exists'
verified_features.employee_code_duplicate_409: PASS - POST /api/admin/users returns 409 'Employee code already exists'
verified_features.toggle_switch_not_checkbox: PASS - Group Sub-tasks uses custom toggle switch (not checkbox), displayed as flex single line
verified_features.task_count_badge: PASS - Task count badge '7' displayed next to 'Task Management' title
verified_features.project_filter_meeting_tasks: PASS - Filter by Project 2 shows 3 tasks including meeting-linked tasks (Review Backlog, Direct Project Task, Task 1 - Meeting 1 - Project 2)
verified_features.search_subtask_group_off: PASS - Search 'Update Sprint Board' shows subtask with Group Sub-tasks OFF
verified_features.search_subtask_group_on: PASS - Search 'Update Sprint Board' shows subtask with Group Sub-tasks ON (as orphan entry)
verified_features.dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard loads correctly with all cards and charts
verified_features.projects_page_loads: PASS - Projects page loads with 3 projects
verified_features.meetings_page_loads: PASS - Meetings page loads with 3 meetings
